label: Rates Overview
description: Comparison table of APY rates across lending protocols, staking pools, and LP positions.

l0.notes: 0.1 error boundary via WidgetErrorBoundary in widget-wrapper.tsx confirmed. 0.2/0.3 entitlements and availableOn set. 0.4 no any/ts-ignore. 0.5 no mock imports in widget. 0.6 isLoading=false wired to TableWidget (context does not expose isLoading — open finding). 0.7 emptyMessage passed to TableWidget. 0.8 error not wirable without context change — TableWidget accepts it when context adds it (open finding). 0.9 no dead code.

l1.notes: 1.1 data sourced via useDeFiData() — pass. 1.2 context calls useGlobalScope() — pass. 1.3 org filter only partially applied: lendingProtocols filtered by hasDefiDesk (orgId check), but liquidityPools and stakingProtocols are unfiltered LIQUIDITY_POOLS/STAKING_PROTOCOLS constants regardless of scope — fail. 1.4 no clientId filter cascade in context for any DeFi data — fail. 1.5 strategy filter applied to tradeHistory only; rates data (lending/staking/LP) not filtered by strategyIds — partial. 1.6 empty organizationIds returns all data (hasDefiDesk=true when length=0) — pass. 1.7 reference data (LENDING_PROTOCOLS, STAKING_PROTOCOLS, LIQUIDITY_POOLS) sourced from lib/mocks/fixtures/ not lib/constants/ — fail.

findings.description: defi-data-context does not expose isLoading field. Widget now passes isLoading={false} to TableWidget explicitly. Full loading state requires context to add an isLoading field.
defi-data-context does not expose an error field. TableWidget accepts an error prop when available. Full error state requires context to add an error field.

liquidityPools and stakingProtocols are returned as raw unfiltered constants (LIQUIDITY_POOLS, STAKING_PROTOCOLS) regardless of globalScope.organizationIds. Only lendingProtocols applies an org filter via hasDefiDesk.
No clientId filter cascade in defi-data-context. globalScope.clientIds is not read or applied to any DeFi rates data.
Strategy filter (globalScope.strategyIds) applied to tradeHistory only. lendingProtocols, stakingProtocols, and liquidityPools are not filtered by strategyIds.

LENDING_PROTOCOLS imported from lib/mocks/fixtures/defi-lending, STAKING_PROTOCOLS from lib/mocks/fixtures/defi-staking, LIQUIDITY_POOLS from lib/mocks/fixtures/defi-liquidity. Reference data should be in lib/constants/ or lib/config/.
